scripts.dev:desktop: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; bun run dev:server & bun run dev:client & bun run --filter @stepwise/desktop dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter @stepwise/shared build && bun run --filter @stepwise/server build && bun run --filter @stepwise/client build && bun run --filter @stepwise/desktop build
scripts.build:desktop: bun run --filter @stepwise/shared build && bun run --filter @stepwise/server build && bun run --filter @stepwise/client build && bun run --filter @stepwise/desktop build
scripts.package:desktop: bun run build:desktop && bun run --filter @stepwise/desktop make
scripts.smoke:desktop: bun run build:desktop && bun run --filter @stepwise/desktop package
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @stepwise/shared typecheck && bun run --filter @stepwise/server typecheck && bun run --filter @stepwise/client typecheck && bun run --filter @stepwise/desktop typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --filter @stepwise/server lint && bun run --filter @stepwise/client lint && bun run --filter @stepwise/desktop lint
